$comment: FC17.9(a) (D-CSUBSET-C11-THREADS-TRAMPOLINES) Cycle 2 - C11 <threads.h> thread CREATION on 3 legs. elf x86_64 + arm64 (qemu) resolve thrd_create/thrd_join/call_once as DIRECT libc.so.6 FFI (glibc>=2.28, `nm -D` verified real dynamic exports on both arches); pe64 SYNTHESIZES them over kernel32 (thrd_create DIRECT-PASS to CreateThread, thrd_join a multi-block WaitForSingleObject/GetExitCodeThread/CloseHandle, call_once over InitOnceExecuteOnce via the __dss_once_tramp adapter). A REAL spawned thread returns 42 through thrd_join, and call_once fires bump_once exactly once (g_once_count == 1) so exit = 42 + (1-1) = 42; a 0x/2x call_once shifts it to 41/43 (both witnesses load-bearing). Fold-resistant (a real CreateThread/pthread_create cannot const-fold), so the release arm runs the true path. macho CARVED OUT (D-CSUBSET-C11-THREADS-MACHO) so there is NO darwin arm. RED-on-disable: delete shippedLibs/threads.json -> the #include fires F_ShippedHeaderNotFound and the compile fails.
